incident_date.question: When did the incident occur? Please provide the date in any format (DD-MM-YYYY, YYYY-MM-DD, or even '2 days ago').

amount_lost.question: How much money did you lose or send? Please tell me the amount.

upi_transaction_id.question: What is the UPI transaction ID or reference number?

suspect_upi_id.question: What is the suspect's UPI ID that received the money?

platform.question: Which UPI platform/app was used? (e.g., Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, Bank App)
platform.hint: Example: GPay or PhonePe or Paytm or SBI App

caller_number.question: What was the caller's phone number?

bank_name.question: Which bank or financial institution did the caller claim to represent?
bank_name.hint: Example: SBI or HDFC or ICICI or Paytm Payments Bank

call_recording.question: Did you record the call? (You can upload it later if yes)

otp_shared.question: Did you share any OTP with the caller?

phishing_url.question: What was the phishing URL or website address?

data_compromised.question: What data or information was compromised? (passwords, cards, personal info)
data_compromised.hint: Example: My credit card details or Login password or Aadhaar number

email_screenshot.question: Do you have a screenshot of the phishing email or message? (You can upload it)

bank_involved.question: Which bank or account was targeted in the phishing attack?
bank_involved.hint: Example: HDFC Bank or SBI Savings Account

amount_invested.question: How much money did you invest in this scheme?

platform_name.question: Which platform or app was used for this investment?
platform_name.hint: Example: Telegram or WhatsApp or a fake investment app

recruiter_contact.question: How can you be contacted by the recruiter or person who guided you?

payment_proof.question: Do you have any payment proof like screenshot or transaction ID? (You can upload it)

platform_used.question: Which platform or app was used by the suspect? (WhatsApp, Telegram, Instagram, etc.)
platform_used.hint: Example: WhatsApp or Telegram or Instagram DM

suspect_contact.question: What is the suspect's contact information (phone/ID)?

screenshot_available.question: Do you have any screenshots of the conversations? (You can upload them)

amount_demanded.question: How much money did they demand from you?

utr_number.question: Do you have the UTR (Unique Transaction Reference) number? (You can upload it later)

screenshot.question: Do you have any screenshot of the transaction or conversation? (You can upload it)
